extraction.one_line_summary: GUERREIRO attacked with CASTROVIEJO on final climb, sat on until final meters, took maiden grand tour win gaining time on ALMEIDA's group.
tactical_patterns: BJERG bridging solo mid-race after early break formed signals exceptional diesel strength for future mountain domestique work.
NIBALI's team aborted attack when insufficient damage done immediately behind, revealing defensive threshold judgment for protecting top-five.
GUERREIRO refusing to share workload with CASTROVIEJO after final attack succeeded by tactical patience, not counterattack strength.

rider_signals.GUERREIRO Ruben: positive: won first grand tour stage by sitting on CASTROVIEJO's wheel entire final climb despite being weaker team
rider_signals.BJERG Mikkel: positive: bridged solo from peloton to established breakaway showing exceptional endurance capacity beyond standard rouleur profile
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: abandoned attack immediately when group stayed close, suggesting defensive rather than aggressive GC positioning mentality
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: lost seconds but held pink, now 30s ahead with BILBAO and KELDERMAN gaining most time
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: gained time alongside HAMILTON Lucas attacking GC group, showing opportunistic aggression beyond standard domestique role
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: gained time moving closer to podium positions without visible effort in commentary
